info.title: App Connect CRM Server
info.description: OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the App Connect Express server endpoints. Runtime source of truth is packages/core/index.ts plus app-specific routes in src/index.ts. RingCentral call and message entity schemas are modeled from the attached RingCentral platform OAS and trimmed to the fields this server consumes.

get.summary: List implemented connector methods for a platform

get.description: Kept for backward compatibility with older clients.

get.summary: Return merged global and connector release notes
Resolve hostname metadata for a platform
Return a hash for the current user info
Preload user settings for a platform

post.description: Resolves the current user from the App Connect JWT, refreshes OAuth credentials when needed, then calls the connector's refreshUserInfo interface.

parameters.name: overridingFormat
parameters.description: Comma-separated phone-number formats used by CRM-specific matching.

parameters.name: isForceRefreshAccountData
parameters.description: Bypass and refresh cached contact search data.

get.description: Looks up local App Connect call-log linkage records by RingCentral session id and extension identity. hashedExtensionId is preferred when present; extensionNumber is retained as a legacy fallback. When requireDetails is true, also fetches the current CRM activity details through the connector getCallLog interface.

post.description: Creates one CRM activity/log for a RingCentral call and stores the local mapping for later updates. The mapping is keyed by session id plus extension identity. Client-side requests may send hashedExtensionId; server-side logging may send rcExtensionId, which the adapter server hashes locally before duplicate checks and persistence. The logInfo object follows the RingCentral CallLogRecord shape, trimmed to fields consumed by App Connect.

patch.description: Updates an existing CRM call activity using the local mapping found by sessionId and extension identity. hashedExtensionId is preferred when present; rcExtensionId is hashed locally for server-side logging; extensionNumber remains a legacy fallback.

post.summary: Cache a call note before full logging
Create or update an SMS/fax/message log
post.description: Creates or updates CRM activities for SMS, MMS, voicemail, fax, and shared SMS conversations. The server groups normal messages by conversation/day and shared SMS by conversationLogId.

post.summary: Register a plugin for an account

delete.summary: Unregister a plugin for an account

get.summary: Get plugin license status for a user

post.description: Receives async call-log plugin completion. The task id in the path validates the callback task.

404.description: Async plugin task was not found or expired.

500.description: Callback was valid, but App Connect failed to update the CRM log.

get.summary: OAuth authorization server metadata for MCP PKCE clients
Redirect MCP PKCE OAuth authorization to RingCentral

post.summary: Return MCP public client registration metadata

401.description: Bearer challenge for protected MCP requests.

post.summary: Create or connect a Google Sheet

get.summary: Open admin Google Sheets file picker

post.summary: Create or connect an admin Google Sheet
Select an admin Google Sheet tab

302.description: Redirects to the final Pipedrive target.

userJwt.description: User session JWT. The server also accepts legacy jwtToken query parameters for backward compatibility.

rcAccessToken.name: rcAccessToken
rcAccessToken.description: RingCentral access token used for admin validation.

phoneNumber.name: phoneNumber
phoneNumber.description: Phone number to search, normally E.164.

taskId.name: taskId
taskId.description: Async plugin task id generated by App Connect.

jwtToken.name: jwtToken
jwtToken.description: Legacy user session JWT query parameter. Prefer Authorization: Bearer <token>.

sessionIds.name: sessionIds
sessionIds.description: Comma-separated RingCentral call session ids. The server processes at most five ids.

extensionNumber.name: extensionNumber
extensionNumber.description: Legacy RingCentral extension number used to disambiguate duplicated call session ids when hashedExtensionId is unavailable.

hashedExtensionId.name: hashedExtensionId
hashedExtensionId.description: Hashed RingCentral extension id used to disambiguate duplicated call session ids. Preferred over extensionNumber when available.

requireDetails.name: requireDetails
requireDetails.description: When true, the server calls the connector getCallLog interface and includes CRM log details.

isExtension.name: isExtension
isExtension.description: Marks the lookup as an internal extension-number lookup.

OkJson.description: Successful JSON response. Exact response shape depends on the route and connector interface.

BadRequest.description: Bad request, missing authentication, or connector error.

UnauthorizedSession.description: The user session is expired or revoked.

extensionNumber.description: Legacy RingCentral extension number identity fallback.

hashedExtensionId.description: Hashed RingCentral extension id generated by the client for client-side call logging requests.

rcExtensionId.description: Raw RingCentral extension id sent by server-side call logging; the adapter server hashes it locally before duplicate checks and persistence.

extensionNumber.description: Legacy RingCentral extension number identity fallback.

hashedExtensionId.description: Hashed RingCentral extension id used to find the local call-log mapping.

rcExtensionId.description: Raw RingCentral extension id sent by server-side call logging; the adapter server hashes it locally before lookup.

extensionNumber.description: Legacy RingCentral extension number identity fallback.

hashedExtensionId.description: Hashed RingCentral extension id used to find the local call-log mapping.
